description:
Per docs/SPEC-tracker-state.md (delivered by bl-40e9). Collapse the master_url 'mode' into one un-moded mechanism.

- config.json gains state_url / state_branch (the tracker address); both optional, absent => (origin, balls/tasks) resolved live. Retire the .balls/master.json pointer -- fold its content into config.json. config.json is no longer symlinked anywhere.
- Store::discover resolves ONE checkout, .balls/state-repo, for every repo. Retire the .balls/worktree-vs-.balls/state-repo split and the state_worktree_for branch. Standalone = a state-repo whose state_url is the code origin.
- bl remaster <url> writes the address; --detach removes it. No transplant: detach is an address edit + ordinary reconcile. Drop adopt_state_into_worktree and try_cold_detach's special-casing; the first-federation race becomes an ordinary divergence.
- Reachability: hard-fail first contact on an explicit unreachable tracker; local git-init fallback when state_url is absent (the implicit default); soft-fail warm.
- Migrate existing repos: legacy master.json and in-config master_url/state_remote read transparently and rewrite to state_url on next remaster; an existing standalone .balls/worktree migrates to .balls/state-repo.

Conformance (SPEC SS16) tests 1,2,3,4,7,8,9,10,11,13,14 must exist and FAIL against current code before this lands. Test 12 -- merge cleanliness in the two-participant topology -- is a hard, non-negotiable gate.
title: Unify the state checkout — retire federated mode
